name: DocumentChecklistRequest
description: Handles citizen requests for the list of documents required to submit or progress a development or licensing application.
triggerPhrases: What forms do I need to fill in
What do I need to submit
I need the forms for my application
What evidence do I need to provide
Can you send me the requirements
What do I need for my development application

entities.name: caseNumber
entities.prompt: Do you have a case reference number? If so, I can send you a personalised checklist.

entities.name: applicationType
entities.prompt: What type of application is this for?

actions.description: Trigger Flow-04 to retrieve and send the document checklist.

confirmationMessage: I've sent you the document checklist. You should receive it shortly via your preferred contact method.
fallbackMessage: I can send you the standard document checklist. Which type of application is this for?
